param.name: use_cache_result
param.doc: Use a cached count if one exists. Default is false.

param.name: search_timeout_sec
param.doc: Timeout in seconds for the LDAP/AD search commands. This can be increased for very large directories. Default is 30s

method.name: GET
method.doc: To count the user objects in the primary reverse proxy user registry and federated directories with the RESTful web service, issue an HTTP GET command on the user count URI.

param.name: user_registry
param.doc: Count of user objects in the primary reverse proxy user registry.

param.name: federated_directories
param.doc: The user counts from federated LDAP/AD servers.

param.name: last_counted
param.doc: The date/time the user count tool was last run, ie "18 Jan 2025 19:26:38"

param.name: registry_count
param.doc: Count of user objects in federated registry. Note property names in this dictionary are defined by the federated directory name in the ldap.conf file.

response.doc: There is a problem with the request. The JSON message describes the problem.
File not Found, The requested service does not exist. The JSON message indicates which resource.
An internal error occurred. The JSON message indicates the problem.
